title: Schedule
hoursClosed: Place is closed at this time
subtitle: Drag voted places onto the timeline to build each day.
allowDuplicatesOn: A place can repeat across days, handy for daily stops.
allowDuplicatesOff: Each place appears once across the whole trip.
noMoreCandidates: No more candidates left to schedule.
routeEmpty: Your route flow will appear here once you schedule stops for the day.
openRouteInMaps: Open the full day's route in Google Maps
tapToAdd: Tap an item below to add it to your day
conflictOverlap: This time overlaps another event. Try moving it.
outOfRange: This time is outside the day
dragToStart: Drag a place here to start scheduling.
dedupeDesc_one: This will remove {{count}} duplicate entry from your schedule. The oldest copy of each place is kept.
dedupeDesc_other: This will remove {{count}} duplicate entries from your schedule. The oldest copy of each place is kept.
